arts.ttl: Barcelona on alert: AC Milan ready to sell star attacker
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have on Friday been put on alert. This comes owing to the latest media chatter stemming from Italy. AC Milan, it is understood,…

arts.ttl: Flick reveals ‘Pedri plan’ for Dani Olmo and offers Vitor Roque update
arts.sum: Flick was asked if he had any advice for Roque when it comes to staying in Europe or going back to Brazil, but the German boss was pretty blunt in his answer and made it clear he’s not thinking at all about Vitor’s immediate future since he’s not a Barça player. Pedri is now fully healthy and has not missed a single game because of injury this season, and Flick revealed that a similar plan will be employed to try and help Dani Olmo’s ability to stay fit and get over his muscle problems.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hits out at referees abuse amid Real Madrid feud
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick continues his protection drive of referees as Real Madrid continue to lead the charge of criticism.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star reveals admiration for Liverpool’s Virgil van Dijk: ‘I pay a lot of attention to him’

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Las Palmas - La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona's predicted lineup for their upcoming La Liga clash against Las Palmas on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Flick says Benfica won’t be ‘easy opponent’, talks UCL hopes
arts.sum: Flick also addressed the possibility of winning a Treble as the Copa del Rey semi-final with Atlético Madrid is also around the corner, and the coach says it’s a very difficult but achievable goal for his team. I don’t think they’re an easy opponent at all.”

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal says Lionel Messi is not the player he'd want to be if he could be anyone
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has dubbed Lionel Messi as the greatest sportsman on planet Earth at present, but admitted he would be born again as Neymar Jr when probed on a hypothetical scenario
